title: Villager Age Tweak
description: Basic mod for player to change villager age cooldown
body:
# NEW MOD 
 **" MOB AGE TWEAK " : 
 including all the passtive mobs NOT JUST VILLAGERS**

 # link here : https://modrinth.com/mod/mob-age-tweak
 
 With better commands and better access to change each passive mob data
# 
 ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0c029bcfc6161a1ae97c376e15605d771625e85_0.webp)
# The Villager Age Tweak ?? What is that ?
The Villager Age Tweak mod allows you to fully customize the villager growth cooldown in Minecraft, giving you control over how fast baby villagers grow into adults. This mod is perfect for players who want more control over village population growth, whether you're building farms, managing a village, or simply experimenting with villager mechanics.

Whether you're a **vanilla player** looking to enhance your gameplay **without drastically altering the core experience**, or a **modded player** who wants seamless integration with other mods, Villager Age Tweak provides flexibility and ease of use. It's ideal for improving efficiency in villager-based farms, breeding systems, and even large-scale modded worlds where controlling villager growth plays a key role in automation or customization.

# **Short Video about the mod and how it work**
[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UR1rfJp98uk](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UR1rfJp98uk)
